title: Rav's Halloween
description: This Mod Adds New Halloween Themed Mobs And Armor Also WEAPONS
body: Needs Geckolib Rav,s Halloween Adds New Mobs Weapons And Armor The Main Thing You Need In This Mod Is The Candy Bucket To Make A Trick Or Trader Villager Trick Or Trader Villagers Can Give Costumes And Weapons. Also Check Out My Youtube rav_sniper1
